meta.title: Pilot Program - Baara
meta.description: Access pre-evaluated Go, SRE, and Infra engineers. Proof Profiles with scores and evidence. Try for free.

hero.title: Hire engineers
hero.subtitle: Candidates take a standardized Work Sample and get a Proof Profile with score, percentile, and evidence. You access the results directly. Zero screening.

benefits.item1: Pre-evaluated profiles with scores and evidence
benefits.item2: Interview Kit generated for each candidate

form.title: Request pilot access
form.subtitle: Access pre-evaluated tech profiles with Proof Profiles. We'll set up your access within 48h.

step1.emailHelper: We'll respond within 48h with your access configured.

step2.baselineSectionHint: Helps us measure Baara's impact on your hiring
step2.baselinePainPointPlaceholder: Ex: too much screening / weak signal on profiles / cycle too long…
step2.jobLinkPlaceholder: URL of the job description if it exists
step2.messagePlaceholder: What you're looking for, number of positions, constraints…
step2.consent: I agree to be contacted by Baara about the pilot.

confirmation.title: Thanks — we're setting up your access.
confirmation.item2: Access to Proof Profiles for your target role
confirmation.demoCta: In the meantime, see how a Proof Profile works.

workSample.title: Verified Proof Profiles
workSample.description: Every candidate has completed a standardized Work Sample. Overall score, percentile, strengths with cited evidence.

rubric.title: Explicit criteria
rubric.description: You see exactly what was evaluated and how. No black box.

aiEval.title: Interview Kit
aiEval.description: Personalized questions generated from the Proof Profile. Focus the interview on what matters.

humanReview.title: Decision Memo
humanReview.description: Structured summary with reasoned recommendation for each candidate.

decisionMemo.title: Objective comparison
decisionMemo.description: Compare candidates on the same criteria. No more screening bias.

feedback.title: Integrated candidate feedback
feedback.description: Every candidate receives structured feedback. Your employer brand benefits.

week1.title: Onboarding
week1.description: Account setup. Define your target role and priority criteria.

week2.title: First profiles
week2.description: Access existing Proof Profiles. Review candidates with Interview Kits.

week3.title: Targeted interviews
week3.description: Interviews guided by Interview Kits. Decision Memos for each candidate seen.

week4.title: Review
week4.description: Results analysis. Comparison with your current process. Decision to continue.

job.title: 1 active tech need
job.description: A real hiring need for Go, SRE, or Infra/Platform roles.

time.title: ~30 min per profile
time.description: To review the Proof Profile and Interview Kit before the interview.

feedback.title: Honest feedback
feedback.description: Your input helps us improve matching quality.

pricing.title: Free during the pilot
pricing.description: 4 weeks of full access. No fees. Decide after.

features.workSample: Access to Proof Profiles for your target role

realJob.question: Where do the candidates come from?
realJob.answer: Candidates come to Baara on their own to take a standardized Work Sample and get their Proof Profile. They choose whether to make their profile public. You only access public profiles.

cost.question: What's the cost of the pilot?
cost.answer: The pilot is free. 4 weeks of full access. You decide whether to continue or not, with no commitment.

time.question: How much time do I need to invest?
time.answer: About 30 minutes per profile: review the Proof Profile, Interview Kit, and prepare your interview. No more screening to do.

candidates.question: How many profiles are available?
candidates.answer: The pool grows every week. For launch, we're focusing on Backend Go, SRE, and Platform Engineering roles in France.

after.question: What happens after the pilot?
after.answer: Review together. If it works, preferential pricing to continue. If not, no obligation.

techStack.question: What type of profiles are available?
techStack.answer: Currently: Backend Go, SRE / Infrastructure, and Platform Engineering. More roles coming soon (Frontend React, Backend Python, Data Engineering).

cta.title: Access pre-evaluated engineers.
cta.description: Verified Proof Profiles. Zero screening. Try free for 4 weeks.
